title: crotalaria glauca
intro: Crotalaria glauca, also known as bush calotrope or yellow calotrope, is a flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria glauca include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria glauca can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or mixing the powdered plant material with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
